summary: Audience tape with solid sound quality (despite slight speed quirks) captures the monster second‑half featuring Good Lovin > Main Ten > Alligator and a magical NFA jam.
review: The recording, sourced from an audience mic, is generally clear and shows a noticeable improvement over older versions, though it runs slightly fast in spots and only covers the final ~30 minutes. Musically the show is hailed as “absolute monster” with standout moments like Good Lovin, Main Ten, Alligator and a superb jam into NFA, earning high praise from reviewers.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (9/5) outweighs the decent but imperfect recording that is limited to the last half hour; overall rating reflects a high‑quality show with good audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear overall, slight speed/pitch variation noted by one reviewer; praised as an upgrade over older sources but only the last ~30 minutes are present.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only the latter half of the concert is captured, but it flows powerfully with Good Lovin > Main Ten > Good Lovin and then Alligator into a thrilling NFA jam.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Unusual lyric (“Mama told me don’t go down there”) noted, though not tied to a specific song.
